name: w3-chainlink-action
description: Chainlink on-chain primitives for W3 workflows — price feeds, CCIP cross-chain transfers, VRF randomness, Functions off-chain compute, proof of reserve, and data streams.

scripts.test: node --test test/feeds.test.js test/por.test.js test/ccip.test.js test/vrf.test.js test/functions.test.js
scripts.all: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
